name: RuntimeEnvironment
summary: ON::RuntimeEnvironment identifies a runtime environment (operating system). This value is saved in binary archives so appropriate adjustments to resources provided by runtime environments, like fonts, can be made when an archive created in one runtime environment is used in another.

enum_values.name: Unset
enum_values.summary: ON::RuntimeEnvironment::Unset indicates no runtime is set.

enum_values.name: None
enum_values.summary: ON::RuntimeEnvironment::None indicates no runtime. This is a different condition from ON::Runtime::Unset.

enum_values.name: Windows
enum_values.summary: ON::RuntimeEnvironment::Windows indicates some version of Microsoft Windows.

enum_values.name: Apple
enum_values.summary: ON::RuntimeEnvironment::Apple indicates some version of Apple OS X or iOS.

enum_values.name: Android
enum_values.summary: ON::RuntimeEnvironment::Android indicates some version of Google Android.

enum_values.name: Linux
enum_values.summary: ON::RuntimeEnvironment::Linux indicates some version of Linux.

enum_values.name: WebAssembly
enum_values.summary: ON::RuntimeEnvironment::WebAssembly indicates some version of WASM / WebAssembly.
